indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX account_credit_transactions_pkey ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_account_created_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (account_id, created_at)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_account_id_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (account_id, id)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_expiry_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (account_id, expiry_at) WHERE (expiry_at IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_account_type_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (account_id, type)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_account_currency_type_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (account_id, currency, type)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_type_expiry_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (type, expiry_at)
CREATE INDEX acct_credit_tx_reference_idx ON public.account_credit_transactions USING btree (reference_type, reference_id)
